description: A plain candid color photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) of two smiling female CBP / Border Patrol agents posing with their horses inside a covered stable. The agent on the left wears a green Border Patrol uniform with a name tag, badge, white cowboy hat, and duty belt, holding the lead of a brown horse. The agent on the right wears a camouflage uniform with a 'K9' patch and holds the lead of a gray/white horse; both horses wear saddles and bridles. Additional horses and tack are visible in the background. The photo was posted to celebrate CBP's anniversary and humanizes its mounted/horse patrol personnel, but contains no overlaid text, slogan, or seal, so it is a routine staff photo rather than a designed meme/poster.
